question: What is missing before MachLib can reason about how many roots a polynomial has?
current_unlock: MachLib now has a tiny polynomial AST/evaluator and five checked finite root samples.
missing_primitives: normal form or coefficient list representation
induction principle connecting degree to roots
safe_next_steps: Define degree for the tiny Poly AST.
Define a coefficient-list representation or normalizer.
Prove degree zero/one facts before any broad root-count claim.
Keep all degree/root-count work internal until checked artifacts exist.
